detaileddescription.para: Index of parent entry on NeuroMesh.

briefdescription.para: Id of electrical compartment in which this diffusive compt lives.
Return coords of middle of PSD.
Returns index of self. Only a single voxel.
Returns Id of shaft electrical compartment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ChemCompt *other, unsigned int myIndex, double granularity, vector< VoxelJunction > &ret)
memberdef.name: matchCubeMeshEntries

memberdef.argsstring: (const ChemCompt *compt, unsigned int myIndex, double granularity, vector< VoxelJunction > &ret) const
memberdef.name: matchCubeMeshEntriesToHead

briefdescription.para: Returns Id of head electrical compartment.

detaileddescription.para: Generate list of matching CubeMesh entries to the single Head entry.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ChemCompt *compt, unsigned int myIndex, double granularity, vector< VoxelJunction > &ret) const
memberdef.name: matchCubeMeshEntriesToPSD

detaileddescription.para: Generate list of matching CubeMeshEntries to the single PSD.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ChemCompt *compt, unsigned int myIndex, double &area, double &length) const
memberdef.name: matchNeuroMeshEntriesToShaft

detaileddescription.para: Find the matching matching NeuroMesh entry index to the root of the shaft of this spine. Also compute the area and diffusion length of the shaft.
Find the matching NeuroMesh entry index to the root of the shaft of this spine. Also compute the area and diffusion length of the shaft.

briefdescription.para: Return coords of centre of spine head.
Returns index of parent entry located on NeuroMesh.

detaileddescription.para: moves Spine entry so that shaft base is now positioned at xyz.
psdCoords is used to build the PsdMesh. The function returns 8 coords to define the psd: centre xyz direction xyz dia, diffusion distance to middle of spine Head.

briefdescription.para: Assigns index of parent entry located on NeuroMesh.

detaileddescription.para: Resizes SpineEntry. Takes original shaft base and scales up from there. Retains original shaft dimensions, only the head is scaled.
x1y1z1 x2y2z2 x3y3z3 r0 r1. Here x1 is farthest, x2 is junction between neck and shaft, and x3 is on the dend. r0 is radius of spine head, r1 of shaft.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id shaft, Id head, unsigned int parent)
memberdef.name: SpineEntry

detaileddescription.para: This builds the node using info from the compartment.
Helper class for the SpineMesh. Defines the geometry of the spine and provides the innter function for mapping to CubeMeshes.

briefdescription.para: Return volume of spine. Ignores shaft volume. Virtual func.

detaileddescription.para: Helper class for the SpineMesh. Defines a single spine.
